name: Mesa
notePs: Plunge is headquartered right here in Mesa — 555 W 2nd Ave, near downtown. When you call us, you're calling a neighbor, not a dispatch center three cities away, and our response times around Mesa show it.

We work in every corner of the city: mid-century homes near Main Street and Dobson Ranch, where original galvanized pipe and slab-era plumbing are reaching the end of their lifespan, out to the newer builds in Eastmark and Las Sendas. And like the rest of the East Valley, Mesa's notoriously hard water is behind a huge share of the scale buildup, clogs, and worn-out fixtures we get called for every day.
